name: html-anything
description: Turn any file into a beautiful, interactive, shareable HTML.

scripts.examples: tsx src/cli.ts examples/markdown/input.md --no-ai --out examples/markdown/output.html --title 'The Long, Slow, Inevitable Death of the PDF' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/whatsapp/input.txt --no-ai --out examples/whatsapp/output.html --title 'Alex & Mira' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/csv/input.csv --no-ai --out examples/csv/output.html --title 'Coffee Equipment Sales — January 2026'
